name_en: Top-tier Replica [Exclusive Photo M12656 Green] This Brazza wallet is made from Monogram Heritage canvas, witnessing Pharrell Williams' fresh interpretation of the iconic Monogram pattern. The interlaced texture and Marque L.Vuitton Déposée logo display classic elements of the original Damier print, paired with multiple card slots and compartments for a long wallet design that remains functional. 19 x 2 x 10 cm (H x W x L)
